question: I requested a bank withdrawal yesterday. How long can it take after approval?
ground_truth_answer_points: Bank withdrawals may take 1 to 3 business days after approval

question: My reset link is not working after an hour. Is that expected?
Can support tell me what my password currently is?
ground_truth_answer_points: Support agents cannot see or manually reveal user passwords

question: Will a utility bill from 8 months ago work for proof of address?
ground_truth_answer_points: Utility bills older than 6 months are not accepted
